attacking_style: Explosive accelerations in final 500m-2km on steep gradients (4%+) or technical finales, preferring short powerful efforts over sustained climbing. Occasionally attempts audacious long-range attacks (36-65km) but relies primarily on devastating final kilometer power.
team_tactics: Alpecin frequently fails coordination—VAN DER POEL often isolated in finales or forced into leadout duties for teammates (PHILIPSEN/PEDERSEN). Team sacrifices his GC positioning for stage wins. Lacks numerical support compared to super-teams, requiring solo bridging efforts.
terrain_preference: Punchy steep climbs (2km max), technical corners at speed, cobbled classics, and uphill sprints around 4% gradient. Excels where explosive repeatability matters more than sustained climbing. Thrives on courses requiring bike handling + power combination.
vulnerability: Stage racing mountains expose unsustainability of aggressive style (cracked Giro climbs). Tactical hesitation when marked by multiple riders (E3 2021). Sprint leadout positioning errors and getting boxed despite strength. Over-commits chasing after mechanicals, draining reserves for finale.
key_patterns: Attacks at 500m-2km on steepest gradient sections, not summits, exploiting explosive power timing (5+ races)
Frequently sacrifices personal ambitions for team leadout duties despite being strongest rider (7+ observations)
Suffers mechanicals/positioning errors in decisive moments but shows exceptional bridging ability to recover (4 races)
Tactical passivity or hesitation in marked situations costs results despite physical superiority (3+ races)
Demonstrates mental fragility in stage racing GC scenarios but dominates one-day races (Tour/Giro observations)
Wins sprints after failed long-range attacks, showing exceptional energy management and dual threat capacity
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed Monument wins but relied on opponent mechanicals (Roubaix) and lacked answer to Pogačar's sustained power (Flanders). Early-season weakness at Strade Bianche concerning. Retains explosive finale dominance but tactical opportunism questions remain.
built_from: 2021 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
